findings.description: RwLock in children field could cause potential deadlock if nested cgroup operations are performed
findings.fix_code: Consider using SpinLock for children field since it doesn't need blocking semantics

findings.description: pids_max using RwLock might impact performance when frequently accessed
findings.fix_code: Consider using AtomicUsize for pids_max if the value is only updated infrequently

findings.description: add_task doesn't check if the task is already present, could lead to duplicates
Cgroup file creation lacks proper permission checks
findings.fix_code: Add proper access control checks based on cgroup hierarchy and user privileges

findings.description: CLONE_INTO_CGROUP implementation might not properly handle all error cases
findings.fix_code: Add comprehensive error handling and rollback mechanisms
